summary: Small ground/stage decomp-matching PR that fully matched Pokemon Stadium function grStadium_801D2FD0, improved grStadium_801D4548, and brought F-Zero car setup grFZeroCar_801CAFBC closer. The patch mostly reshaped C without changing apparent behavior: renamed two Stadium callbacks from fn_* to grStadium_* in symbols/header/call sites, used typed DynamicModelDesc access in grfzerocar, replaced pointer-walk temporaries with indexed table/data access, factored scale multiplication into a helper, and used a compiler dont_inline pragma instead of a separate inline wrapper.
what_changed: Renamed symbols/prototypes fn_801D2FD0 and fn_801D3084 to grStadium_801D2FD0 and grStadium_801D3084 in config/GALE01/symbols.txt and src/melee/gr/grpstadium.h, and updated GObj_SetupGXLinkMax call sites.

Refactored grStadium_801D2FD0 from an early-return shape into an if (!wrapper->flag) block, introduced an ImageDescWrapper* copy temporary, and kept the lb_800122C8/Ground_801C2BA4/GET_GROUND/display flag sequence inside that guarded block.
Replaced grStadium_801D42B8_dontinline wrapper with #pragma push / #pragma dont_inline on / #pragma pop around grStadium_801D42B8, then called grStadium_801D42B8 directly from grStadium_801D4548.
In grfzerocar.c, included sc/types.h and baselib/gobj.h so setup_car_child could use DynamicModelDesc and grFZeroCar_801CAFBC could use GET_JOBJ.
Changed setup_car_child archive entry access from raw byte offsets and void** loads to a typed DynamicModelDesc* with entry->anims and entry->matanims.
Factored repeated HSD_JObjGetScale / multiply x,y,z / HSD_JObjSetScale logic into static inline multiplyScale.

In grFZeroCar_801CAFBC, replaced root = gobj->hsd_obj with root = GET_JOBJ(gobj), removed PAD_STACK and several local temporaries, changed the loop from pointer-increment style to indexed data_ptr[i] and grFZeroCar_803E0BD8[i] access, and computed the setup_car_child offset inline as (s16) count * 0x34.
smart_moves: Synchronized symbol table, header prototypes, function definitions, and callback call sites in one PR, avoiding stale fn_* names after the match.
Used an existing typed resource descriptor, DynamicModelDesc, instead of anonymous u8*/void** arithmetic; this improved readability while preserving the needed archive layout access.
Used GET_JOBJ rather than direct gobj->hsd_obj access, matching project macro style and likely helping codegen.
Converted a fake dont-inline wrapper into a direct dont_inline pragma around the real function, preserving the intended non-inlining effect while removing an artificial helper.
Kept matching-oriented reshapes small and localized, with no broad behavior changes evident from the diff.
decomp_lessons: For stage callbacks that are no longer anonymous, rename fn_801xxxxx symbols consistently in symbols.txt, headers, definitions, and GObj callback registrations.
Typed archive/resource structs can replace raw pointer arithmetic when their field layout matches the binary; this can both document intent and improve matching.
Array indexing versus pointer-increment locals can affect matching; grFZeroCar_801CAFBC moved toward indexed data_ptr[i] and grFZeroCar_803E0BD8[i] accesses.
Inlining control can be expressed with #pragma dont_inline around the target function instead of introducing wrapper functions solely to influence codegen.
Small control-flow shape changes, such as replacing early return with if (!flag) guarded body, can be enough to finish a function match.
naming_conventions: Stage functions in grpstadium should use the grStadium_801Dxxxx prefix once identified, rather than generic fn_801Dxxxx names.
Header prototypes and GALE01 symbol names should track the same grStadium_* spelling used by definitions and call sites.
The helper added in grfzerocar.c used lower camel case multiplyScale; the diff provides no reviewer feedback on this name.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Introduced a local alias copy = wrapper in grStadium_801D2FD0 before passing &copy->desc to lb_800122C8, a likely register/codegen shaping tactic.
Changed 0x24 to decimal 36 in the lb_800122C8 call; this is semantically equivalent and may have been part of source-shape matching.
Moved active = 0 before child pointer initialization in grFZeroCar_801CAFBC and removed table/data pointer increment locals, suggesting local ordering was tuned for codegen.
Removed PAD_STACK(0x18) from grFZeroCar_801CAFBC after refactoring local usage.
Used #pragma dont_inline on grStadium_801D42B8 so grStadium_801D4548 can call it directly without an extra wrapper while preserving non-inline codegen.
review_feedback: No human review comments or reviews were present in the slice.
Automated decomp.dev report for GALE01 reported matched code 60.38% with +180 bytes.
decomp.dev reported 1 new match: main/melee/gr/grpstadium grStadium_801D2FD0 improved from 95.73% to 100.00% (+8 bytes).
decomp.dev reported 2 unmatched-item improvements: grStadium_801D4548 from 93.78% to 97.29% (+96 bytes) and grFZeroCar_801CAFBC from 98.74% to 99.89% (+35 bytes).
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs touching grFZeroCar_801CAFBC to see what closed the remaining 0.11% gap after this PR.
Search for other grpstadium fn_801Dxxxx callbacks that can be renamed to grStadium_801Dxxxx and synchronized with symbols.txt/header prototypes.
Look for other artificial *_dontinline wrappers that could be replaced with #pragma dont_inline on the real function.
Audit other ground archive users for raw u8*/void** DynamicModelDesc-style access that can be replaced with typed fields.
